round_summary: All three agents demonstrate prosocial signaling with Agent 2 voluntarily self-sanctioning by acknowledging disproportionate herd size and committing to further reductions, while Agents 0 and 1 reinforce cooperative norms through reciprocal affirmation and soft social pressure.

All three agents engage in active institutional signaling around equity norms, with Agent 2 demonstrating cooperative action via reduction, Agent 0 reciprocating with incremental addition to close gaps, and Agent 1 applying soft social sanctioning toward Agent 2 while withholding personal adjustment.
